svg.title: AI Hedge RAG - Low Level Diagram
svg.desc: Detailed low-level architecture showing chunking strategy, embedding, ChromaDB collections, retrieval chain and LLM generation for both Annual Report and Concall pipelines

g.text: detect page type (fin table vs prose)

svg.text: All components free · local · no cloud vector DB costs
ChromaDB persists to disk · SQLite handles doc/chunk index · sentence-transformers runs CPU-only
